zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan Saukeville於大約1170年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親George Sackville26歲，母親Constantia Brooke23歲。他和Maud Normanvil至少有4個兒子。他去世於1233年在英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan Saukeville was born about 1170, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Sackville, was 26 and his mother, Constantia Brooke, was 23. He had at least 4 sons with Maud Normanvil. He died in 1233, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan Saukeville(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Sackville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Constantia Brooke(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Maud Normanvil(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan Saukeville родился около 1170 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Sackville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Constantia Brooke, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Maud Normanvil. Он умер в 1233 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
